title: taraxacum uschakovii
intro: Taraxacum uschakovii, also known as Ussuri dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum uschakovii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
